name: TRIGGER2MARKER
description: Interactive tool to decode 8-bit trigger codes to markers for actiCHamp amplifiers. Simulates Digital Port Settings behavior.

name: Tone Generator
description: Generate pulsed tones and binaural beats for EEG auditory stimulation paradigms. Adjust frequency, pulse rate, duty cycle, and waveform.

name: Screen Flicker (SSVEP)
description: Generate screen flicker stimuli for SSVEP experiments. Adjustable frequency, pattern, and contrast for visual evoked potentials.
